modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: FAFSA parent information in divorce case confusion

full_description_text: User ask about FAFSA. They want to know which parent info to report. This is about divorce situation. User not sure how to fill it out.
